lyra.description: Typed, self-verifying skill contracts over MCP. Five checks: skill_bind (embed a typed contract + proof into a SKILL.md's frontmatter), skill_verify (re-derive the proof locally), skill_refine (R1–R5 refinement check; pass or fail), skill_compose (composition check; pair or chain), skill_merge (atomic merge of producer + consumer). Speaks MCP 2025-06-18 over stdio.
